ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 with timezone offset > formats RFC3339 with positive timezone offset
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 with timezone offset > formats RFC3339 with negative timezone offset
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 with timezone offset > formats RFC3339 with fractional timezone offset
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 with timezone offset > formats RFC3339 UTC with Z suffix
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 with timezone offset > formats RFC3339 with +0000 format
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 without timezone - no offset should be shown > formats RFC3339 without timezone shows only date and time
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 without timezone - no offset should be shown > formats RFC3339 with milliseconds but no timezone
ExifDetails dateShot formatting > RFC3339 without timezone - no offset should be shown > handles trimming of whitespace in dateShot

ExifDetails dateShot formatting > Translation language-based formatting > uses German (de) translation language

ExifDetails dateShot formatting > Translation language-based formatting > uses Spanish (es) translation language

ProtectedMedia Component > getProtectedUrl - Token Appending > appends token from share path to URL
ProtectedMedia Component > getProtectedUrl - Token Appending > does not append token when not on share path
ProtectedMedia Component > getProtectedUrl - Token Appending > handles share path with trailing slash
ProtectedMedia Component > getProtectedUrl - Token Appending > preserves existing URL parameters when appending token
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Lazy Loading > uses native lazy loading when supported
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Lazy Loading > uses IntersectionObserver fallback when native lazy loading not supported
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Lazy Loading > loads image eagerly when lazyLoading is false
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Lazy Loading > sets crossOrigin to use-credentials
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Blurhash > shows blurhash placeholder when loading with lazy loading
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Blurhash > does not show blurhash when image is loaded
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Blurhash > does not show blurhash when blurhash prop is null
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Blurhash > does not show blurhash when blurhash prop is undefined
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Empty State > uses placeholder when src is undefined
ProtectedMedia Component > ProtectedImage - Empty State > passes through additional props to img element

SettingsPage Component > does not render admin-only sections when user is not admin

useScrollPagination Hook > Initial State > returns finished as false initially
useScrollPagination Hook > Initial State > returns containerElem function
useScrollPagination Hook > IntersectionObserver Setup > creates IntersectionObserver with correct options
useScrollPagination Hook > IntersectionObserver Setup > observes element when containerElem is called with node
useScrollPagination Hook > IntersectionObserver Setup > disconnects previous observer when new element is set
useScrollPagination Hook > IntersectionObserver Setup > disconnects observer when containerElem is called with null
useScrollPagination Hook > Loading State Management > does not observe element when loading is true
useScrollPagination Hook > Loading State Management > observes element when loading changes from true to false
useScrollPagination Hook > Loading State Management > unobserves element when loading changes from false to true
useScrollPagination Hook > Data Fetching > fetches more data when element intersects (isIntersecting: false)
useScrollPagination Hook > Data Fetching > calculates correct offset based on current items count
useScrollPagination Hook > Data Fetching > handles empty data result by setting finished
useScrollPagination Hook > Data Change Handling > resets finished to false when data changes
useScrollPagination Hook > Cleanup > disconnects observer on unmount
useScrollPagination Hook > Edge Cases > handles undefined data gracefully
useScrollPagination Hook > Edge Cases > handles empty data array
useURLParameters Hook > getParam > reads existing parameter from URL
useURLParameters Hook > getParam > returns null for non-existent parameter
useURLParameters Hook > getParam > returns defaultValue for non-existent parameter
useURLParameters Hook > getParam > handles URL with no parameters
useURLParameters Hook > setParam > sets a new parameter in URL
useURLParameters Hook > setParam > updates existing parameter in URL
useURLParameters Hook > setParam > removes parameter when value is null
useURLParameters Hook > setParam > removes parameter when value is empty string
useURLParameters Hook > setParam > removes all parameters when last one is set to null
useURLParameters Hook > setParams > sets multiple parameters at once
useURLParameters Hook > setParams > removes parameters when value is null
useURLParameters Hook > setParams > handles empty array of pairs
useURLParameters Hook > setParams > sets and removes parameters in same call
useURLParameters Hook > API Return Values > returns getParam function
useURLParameters Hook > API Return Values > returns setParam function
useURLParameters Hook > API Return Values > returns setParams function
useURLParameters Hook > Edge Cases > handles special characters in parameter values
useURLParameters Hook > Edge Cases > preserves pathname when updating parameters
useOrderingParams Hook > Reading URL Parameters > returns default orderBy when not in URL
useOrderingParams Hook > Reading URL Parameters > returns custom default orderBy when provided
useOrderingParams Hook > Reading URL Parameters > returns orderBy from URL when present
useOrderingParams Hook > Reading URL Parameters > returns default orderBy when URL value is empty string
useOrderingParams Hook > Reading URL Parameters > returns default orderBy when URL value is null
useOrderingParams Hook > orderDirection Handling > returns ASC as default orderDirection
useOrderingParams Hook > orderDirection Handling > returns orderDirection from URL when valid
useOrderingParams Hook > orderDirection Handling > returns ASC when URL value is invalid
useOrderingParams Hook > orderDirection Handling > returns ASC when URL value is null
useOrderingParams Hook > orderDirection Handling > returns ASC when URL value is empty string
useOrderingParams Hook > setOrdering > sets orderBy parameter
useOrderingParams Hook > setOrdering > sets orderDirection parameter
useOrderingParams Hook > setOrdering > sets both orderBy and orderDirection parameters
useOrderingParams Hook > setOrdering > does not call setParams when no arguments provided
useOrderingParams Hook > Toggle Order Direction Pattern > can toggle from ASC to DESC
useOrderingParams Hook > Toggle Order Direction Pattern > can toggle from DESC to ASC
useOrderingParams Hook > Toggle Order Direction Pattern > can change orderBy while keeping current orderDirection
useOrderingParams Hook > Edge Cases > handles all valid OrderDirection values
useOrderingParams Hook > Edge Cases > handles custom orderBy values

Apollo Client Configuration > Error Handler > formats error message for multiple GraphQL errors
